children.heading: Management plan
children.label: 1 Management plan
children.text: The term “management plan” means the management plan for the Scenic Area developed under .section 460ffff–2(a) of this title

children.heading: Map
children.label: 2 Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Proposed Alabama Hills National Scenic Area” and dated .November 7, 2018

children.heading: Motorized vehicle
children.label: 3 Motorized vehicle
children.text: The term “motorized vehicle” means a motorized or mechanized vehicle and includes, when used by a utility, mechanized equipment, a helicopter, and any other aerial device necessary to maintain electrical or communications infrastructure.

children.heading: Scenic area
children.label: 4 Scenic area
children.text: The term “Scenic Area” means the Alabama Hills National Scenic Area established by .section 460ffff–1(a) of this title

children.heading: State
children.label: 5 State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of California.

children.heading: Tribe
children.label: 6 Tribe
children.text: The term “Tribe” means the Lone Pine Paiute-Shoshone Tribe.
